G1-main-menu.note: Title + Start/Tutorial/Armory/Settings on a richer animated background.

G4-canvas-painted.note: Clean 3D battlefield; terrain caps now render without z-fighting and floor shows subtle tiling.

G7-combat-damage.note: Resolve shows the grenade blast cloud at the enemy base; Turn 2 Resolving chip visible.

G8-victory.note: VICTORY card with Play Again / Main Menu + points toast.

G9-move-range-ring.note: Movement-range ring drawn around the unit (origin now follows queued moves).

G10-ground-blast-preview.note: Bold blast-radius ring + landing marker inside the throw ring.

G11-build-placement-ring.note: Green placement ring around the base, now unobstructed by the deck.

G12-objective-hud.note: Turn/phase chip + objective chip both shown.

G13-dead-part-visible.note: Destroyed Command Core listed as a dimmed struck-through 0-HP chip in the targeting list.

G14-end-return-menu.note: Victory screen Main Menu button present.

G15-menu-clean.note: FIXED: main menu has no points badge and no how-to-play hints; background has an added aurora/horizon glow.

G16-build-deck-ducks.note: FIXED: during turret placement the full deck is replaced by a slim 'Placing Gun Turret … Cancel' bar, leaving the green ring and field visible.

G17-action-pace-setting.note: FIXED: Settings now has an Action speed row with Slow / Default / Fast.
